name: Redacted Diagnostics Bundle Agent
purpose: Generate local redacted diagnostics bundle JSON and Markdown reports from safe Jarvis metadata and summaries.
reads: safe dashboard, safety, settings, and LAN status summaries
recent task, event, and approval metadata
writes: local redacted diagnostics Markdown reports under the Jarvis reports directory
local redacted diagnostics JSON reports under the Jarvis reports directory
safetyNotes: Local diagnostics only; no diagnostics are uploaded or sent.
No shell commands, Git writes, VirtualBox automation, installer creation, or external services are used.
Protected secret file contents, token stores, private keys, raw databases, and raw full logs are not read.
Reports are troubleshooting evidence only and do not certify production or security readiness.
